data.name: MainWindow_BackgroundText
data.value: B-b-b-bird, bird, bird, b-bird's the word...

data.name: InstancePropertiesPage_OverridesSubtitle
data.value: Configuration specified to the instance; leaving blank to refer to the global settings

data.name: InstancePropertiesPage_NavigateToGlobalButtonTitle
data.value: Navigate to the global settings page

data.name: InstancePropertiesPage_NavigateToGlobalButtonSubtitle
data.value: Entries here will overwrite the global settings

data.name: InstancePropertiesPage_BehaviorsSubtitle
data.value: How the application acts and chooses strategies

data.name: InstancePropertiesPage_FastLaunchPrompt
data.value: Skip the asset and file validation process if the instance is already built and launch the game directly. May lead to crash if the assets are corrupted.

data.name: InstancePropertiesPage_DangerZoneSubtitle
data.value: These settings are applied instantly and can't be recovered

data.name: InstancePropertiesPage_LinkerPrompt
data.value: Unlock by removing the attached pack brand/metadata that will make the instance losing the ability of updating but gaining the ability of editing all the imported packages.

data.name: SettingsPage_DisplaySubtitle
data.value: The look, the language, the font

data.name: SettingsPage_JavaSubtitle
data.value: Instance will select the best match while launching

data.name: SettingsPage_GameDefaultsSubtitle
data.value: The listing configuration can be override by the instance individually

data.name: AccountCreationMicrosoft_DoneSubtitle
data.value: The account has been linked. Checkout in the next page.

data.name: AccountCreationMicrosoft_Prompt
data.value: The code will be expired in 15 minutes. Please fill this code in the page:

data.name: AccountCreationOffline_Prompt
data.value: Name containing spaces or other non-ascii characters may cause issues.

data.name: AccountCreationPortal_MicrosoftSubtitle
data.value: Enables all the online features and is the only way to play the game legally.

data.name: AccountCreationPortal_TrialSubtitle
data.value: Play as the preset character if dont have an account.

data.name: AccountCreationPortal_OfflineSubtitle
data.value: Nothing good but no Internet connection required.

data.name: AccountCreationPortal_Prompt
data.value: Offline account is unavailable if no Microsoft account is linked.

data.name: AccountPickerDialog_EmptyListPrompt
data.value: No account present in the vault

data.name: ExportPackageListDialog_Prompt
data.value: Export package list of the instance into the selected formatted table file

data.name: FilePickerDialog_AlertPrompt
data.value: File too big makes app crash

data.name: ReferenceVersionPickerDialog_Title
data.value: Choose a version to upgrade/downgrade to

data.name: ReferenceVersionPickerDialog_Prompt
data.value: All the mods will be replaced. Configs will be replaced with new ones.

data.name: TagPickerDialog_Prompt
data.value: Enter a new tag or select from existing ones

data.name: AccountEntryModal_MicrosoftPrompt
data.value: This type of account is type of: No use in the past then no use in the future any more.

data.name: InstancePackageModal_VersionBoxUnspecificSubtitle
data.value: Or pick a version in the list below.

data.name: JavaHomeContainer_RequestJavaPrompt
data.value: Pick the Java executable inside your Java home, such as /bin/java or /bin/java.exe

data.name: NewInstancePage_RequestFilePrompt
data.value: Select a compressed modpack file to import

data.name: AccountsPage_AccountAddingDangerNotificationMessage
data.value: Account with the same uuid already exists

data.name: InstanceHomePage_AccountNotFoundDangerNotificationMessage
data.value: Account is not provided or removed after set

data.name: InstancePropertiesPage_RequestJavaPrompt
data.value: Pick the Java executable inside your Java home, such as /bin/java or /bin/java.exe

data.name: InstancePropertiesPage_UnlockingSuccessNotificationMessage
data.value: The instance is no longer associated to any modpack brand and free to edit.

data.name: InstancePropertiesPage_ThumbnailSettingDangerNotificationMessage
data.value: Selected file is not a valid image or no file selected.

data.name: InstancePropertiesPage_RequestNamePrompt
data.value: Give the instance a new name

data.name: InstanceSetupPage_ImportListNoPackagesWarningNotificationMessage
data.value: No packages found in the file

data.name: MarketplaceSearchPage_ModpackInstallingNotificationMessage
data.value: {0} has been added to the queue

data.name: InstancePackageDependencyModal_AutoVersionSubtitle
data.value: Automatically select the best compatible version

data.name: InstancePage_KeyNotFoundExceptionMessage
data.value: Key '{0}' to the instance is not found or prepared

data.name: SettingsPage_MaintenanceSubtitle
data.value: Check for updates, clear cache, etc.

data.name: SettingsPage_MirrorChyanCdkHint
data.value: Get a CDK to support development:

data.name: AssetImporterDialog_Title
data.value: Add asset or package from file

data.name: AssetImporterDialog_PackageNotFoundLabelText
data.value: Package was not found in the hosting repositories

data.name: AssetImporterDialog_AsAssetDescription
data.value: Falls back to traditional mod.jar placement, losing Polymerium's file management benefits.

data.name: AssetImporterDialog_AsAssetPrompt
data.value: Files stored in persist stay local across redeploys. If "Export with modpack" is enabled, the file is stored in import instead, synced into the live working copy on deploy, and bundled when exporting a modpack.

data.name: AssetImporterDialog_Prompt
data.value: Physical asset files are not shown in the package list. View them in the File Explorer.

data.name: InstanceFilesPage_ModInfoBarTitle
data.value: This page shows physical mod files only

data.name: InstanceFilesPage_ModInfoBarText
data.value: External package references are managed separately and not displayed here.

data.name: InstanceFilesPage_AssetEmptyPrompt
data.value: Select an item to view details

data.name: ModpackExporterDialog_AttachmentsPrompt
data.value: Files included from the import layer are located at

data.name: ModpackExporterDialog_TridentOptionsInfoBarText
data.value: These options only take effect when exporting as Trident Portable Instance.

data.name: ModpackExporterDialog_IncludingSourceToolTip
data.value: Source information links the instance to an internet modpack and enables update support.

data.name: LoaderEditorDialog_NoLoaderPrompt
data.value: Mods will not function without a loader.

data.name: SettingsPage_RestartRequiredLabelText
data.value: Restart is required to take effect.

data.name: GameCrashReportModal_AiExportSuccessMessage
data.value: AI analysis markdown has been exported. Send it to Grok to get advices.

data.name: GameCrashReportModal_AiExportUploadFailedMessage
data.value: Unable to upload the crash log to mclo.gs.

data.name: GameCrashReportModal_AiExportLogUnavailableMessage
data.value: No usable crash log was found for AI analysis export.

data.name: MainWindow_InstanceLaunchingDangerNotificationMessage
data.value: {0} exit unexpectedly. Click the link for more details.

data.name: ProxySettingsDialog_AutoSubtitle
data.value: Automatically detect and use system proxy settings

data.name: ProxySettingsDialog_DisabledSubtitle
data.value: Connect to the Internet without any proxy

data.name: ProxySettingsDialog_RestartRequiredLabelText
data.value: Proxy settings will take effect after restarting the application

data.name: InstanceActivitiesPage_DataManagementSubtitle
data.value: Manage statistics and action records for this instance

data.name: InstanceActivitiesPage_ClearStatisticsConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear all statistics for this instance? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: InstanceActivitiesPage_ClearRecordsConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear all action records for this instance? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: SettingsPage_ClearStatisticsConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear all play statistics for all instances? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: SettingsPage_ClearRecordsConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear all action records for all instances? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: OobeWelcome_Description
data.value: Experience a new way of managing your Minecraft instances with portable metadata and intelligent resource management.

data.name: OobeFeatures_Subtitle
data.value: Explore the key features that set us apart

data.name: OobeFeatures_GitIntegration_Description
data.value: Use Git to collaborate on modpack development with portable metadata files

data.name: OobeFeatures_PortableMetadata_Description
data.value: Share your exact game experience with a simple configuration file

data.name: OobeFeatures_MultiRepository_Description
data.value: Native integration with CurseForge and Modrinth

data.name: OobeFeatures_SmartResource_Description
data.value: Zero file duplication with intelligent symlink distribution

data.name: OobeFeatures_IntegrityCheck_Description
data.value: Every deployment validates file completeness and correctness

data.name: OobeFeatures_OneClick_Description
data.value: Build your game files on-demand from lightweight metadata

data.name: OobeFinish_Description
data.value: Start creating your first Minecraft instance and enjoy a new way of game management.

data.name: OobeFinish_Tip
data.value: Tip: You can always change these settings later in the Settings page.

data.name: OobePrivilege_Subtitle
data.value: Enable Developer Mode for optimal performance

data.name: OobePrivilege_InstructionsDescription
data.value: 1. Click the button below to open Windows Settings 2. Find "Developer Mode" toggle 3. Turn it ON 4. Return here and click "Recheck"

data.name: OobePrivilege_SafetyDescription
data.value: Developer Mode is a Windows feature that enables symbolic links creation without admin rights. It's safe for normal use and can be disabled anytime.

data.name: OobePrivilege_StatusGrantedMessage
data.value: Symbolic link creation is enabled. You're all set!

data.name: OobePrivilege_StatusRequiredMessage
data.value: Developer Mode is needed to create symbolic links for smart resource management.

data.name: OobePrivilege_GrantedWhatDescription
data.value: Symbolic Link Creation privilege from Windows Developer Mode. This allows Polymerium to create file links instead of copying files, enabling efficient resource management across multiple game instances.

data.name: OobePrivacy_WhatWeCollectDescription
data.value: When the application crashes or encounters errors, we may collect error information and diagnostic data to help improve the user experience in future updates.

data.name: OobePrivacy_Promise1Description
data.value: We never collect your personal information, account credentials, or game content.

data.name: OobePrivacy_Promise2Description
data.value: All your game data stays on your computer. Nothing is uploaded without explicit action.

data.name: OobePrivacy_Promise3Description
data.value: This is an open-source project. You can review all our code on GitHub.

data.name: OobePrivacy_AgreementNote
data.value: By continuing, you acknowledge and agree to the privacy terms above.

data.name: MarketplaceSearchPage_Message
data.value: View and download modpacks from various sources. If you need more precise search filters, please search for the modpack on the corresponding website and then enter the name here to install.

data.name: LandingPage_Subtitle
data.value: Quick access to your game world

data.name: ProfileRulesModal_Message
data.value: Apply rules to redirect or skip packages during instance launch. Rules are processed top-to-bottom, with later rules taking precedence.

data.name: ProfileRuleSelectorsModal_Message
data.value: Conditions about how rules are applied

data.name: ModpackExporterDialog_ExcludedTagsDescriptionText
data.value: Packages with selected tags will be excluded from export

data.name: NotificationSidebar_EmptyPrompt
data.value: New growls will stay here until you dismiss them.

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_LockedInfoBarText
data.value: This instance was imported from a modpack, so changes cannot be applied to the modpack's original files.

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_OutdatedTagToolTip
data.value: The original version of this file has changed, usually due to a modpack update.

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_UpdatedTagToolTip
data.value: This file has been modified by the client.

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_DeletedTagToolTip
data.value: The original version of this file was removed, usually due to a modpack update.

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_SelectFilePrompt
data.value: File details and available actions will appear on the right.

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_GitRestoreMenuToolTip
data.value: Discard unstaged changes and delete untracked files

data.name: MaintenanceStoragePage_PurgeCacheConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to purge the cache?

data.name: InstanceDashboardPage_OpenCrashReportsFolderDangerNotificationTitle
data.value: Failed to open crash reports folder

data.name: InstanceFilesPage_DeleteScreenshotConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this screenshot?

data.name: InstanceFilesPage_DeleteModConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete '{0}'?

data.name: InstanceFilesPage_DeleteResourcePackConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete '{0}'?

data.name: InstanceFilesPage_DeleteResourcePackDangerNotificationTitle
data.value: Failed to delete resource pack file

data.name: InstanceFilesPage_DeleteDataPackConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete '{0}'?

data.name: InstanceFilesPage_DeleteDataPackDangerNotificationTitle
data.value: Failed to delete data pack file

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_GitNotRepositoryWarningNotificationMessage
data.value: The directory is not in a git repository.

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_GitRestoreConfirmationMessage
data.value:
This will restore unstaged changes in the current working tree.
Affected entries: {0} - Tracked files will be restored to HEAD - Untracked files and directories will be deleted - Commit history and remotes will not be modified

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_LargeDiffConfirmationMessage
data.value: File is too large. It may take time to compute and render diff.

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_StageConfirmationMessage
data.value: This will overwrite the file from the modpack

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_RestoreConfirmationMessage
data.value: This will discard the changes from game playing

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_GitCommitNoIdentityWarningNotificationMessage
data.value: No Git identity is configured for this repository. Configure user.name and user.email first.

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_GitCommitPrompt
data.value: Enter a commit message. All current changes will be staged before commit.

data.name: InstancePage_ImportPackageSuccessNotificationMessage
data.value: Package {0}({1}) has been added to the instance

data.name: InstancePage_ImportFileSuccessNotificationMessage
data.value: File {0} has been added to the instance

data.name: InstancePage_ImportFileAlreadyExistsDangerNotificationTitle
data.value: Failed to import as solid file

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_ChangesTabToolTip
data.value: Shows how the live working copy differs from the import pack source.

data.name: InstanceWorkspacePage_FilesTabToolTip
data.value: Presenting virtual structure of game files.
